_meta.source: Diablo II / D2R item DB; canonical English names from Arreat Summit

shako.name: Harlequin Crest
shako.flavor: Once worn by a jester whose laughter still echoes in its bells.

andariels-visage.name: Andariel's Visage
andariels-visage.flavor: The face of the Maiden of Anguish, twisted in eternal pain.

crown-of-ages.name: Crown of Ages
crown-of-ages.flavor: The crown bears the weight of centuries of fallen kings.

giant-skull.name: Giant Skull
giant-skull.flavor: The bleached skull of a slain giant, an unsettling helm.

griffons-eye.name: Griffon's Eye
griffons-eye.flavor: A diadem set with the eye of a great griffon.

skin-of-vipermagi.name: Skin of the Vipermagi
skin-of-vipermagi.flavor: Stripped from the great serpent-mages of the deep jungles.

que-hegan-wisdom.name: Que-Hegan's Wisdom
que-hegan-wisdom.flavor: The robes of a high Vizjerei sage.

tyraels-might.name: Tyrael's Might
tyraels-might.flavor: Forged in the High Heavens by the Archangel of Justice himself.

arkaines-valor.name: Arkaine's Valor
arkaines-valor.flavor: The legendary armor of an ancient hero of the heroes ages.

chains-of-honor-armor.name: Chains of Honor
chains-of-honor-armor.flavor: Bound in honor, oathsworn never to break.

dracs-grasp.name: Dracul's Grasp
dracs-grasp.flavor: The hand of a vampire lord, still hungering for blood.

steelrend.name: Steelrend
steelrend.flavor: Gauntlets that shred steel as easily as cloth.

lavagout.name: Lava Gout
lavagout.flavor: The Smiths own gauntlets, eternally burning.

magefist.name: Magefist
magefist.flavor: Worn by an apprentice of the Vizjerei. It bears no fear of fire.

war-traveler.name: War Traveler
war-traveler.flavor: These boots have walked the lands of every Sanctuary.

gore-riders.name: Gore Rider
gore-riders.flavor: Boots stained dark with the blood of countless foes.

silkweave.name: Silkweave
silkweave.flavor: Boots woven from the silk of the Spider Queen.

marrowwalk.name: Marrowwalk
marrowwalk.flavor: Necromantic greaves that drink the marrow of the slain.

string-of-ears.name: String of Ears
string-of-ears.flavor: A grim trophy belt strung with the ears of fallen demons.

arachnids-mesh.name: Arachnid Mesh
arachnids-mesh.flavor: Spun from the silk of the Spider Mother of the Pandemonium.

thundergods-vigor.name: Thundergod's Vigor
thundergods-vigor.flavor: Belt forged from the lightning of the Skovos heavens.

verdungos-hearty.name: Verdungo's Hearty Cord
verdungos-hearty.flavor: A belt that strengthens the bearer with every breath.

stone-of-jordan.name: Stone of Jordan
stone-of-jordan.flavor: A ring of legend, the dream of every adventurer.

bul-kathos.name: Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band
bul-kathos.flavor: Worn by the ancient warlord himself. It whispers of strength and vitality.

raven-frost.name: Raven Frost
raven-frost.flavor: A ring of pure cold, hewn from the heart of an icy storm.

carrion-wind.name: Carrion Wind
carrion-wind.flavor: It carries the stench of the Burial Grounds.

mara-kaleidoscope.name: Mara's Kaleidoscope
mara-kaleidoscope.flavor: Beloved of mages, a tiny window onto every magic.

highlords-wrath.name: Highlord's Wrath
highlords-wrath.flavor: The sigil of the Highlord. Lightning sings in its chains.

atmas-scarab.name: Atma's Scarab
atmas-scarab.flavor: Worn by a tavern-keeper who fled a burning desert city.

seraphs-hymn.name: Seraph's Hymn
seraphs-hymn.flavor: The angels sing of judgment, and the wicked tremble.

grandfather.name: The Grandfather
grandfather.flavor: A sword wielded by an ancient hero. The blade alone weighs more than most men.

doombringer.name: Doombringer
doombringer.flavor: A sword that hums with the death-cries of all who have fallen to it.

breath-of-the-dying-uniq.name: Breath of the Dying
breath-of-the-dying-uniq.flavor: The last breath of the slain rises from this blade.

windforce.name: Windforce
windforce.flavor: Imbued with the howling tempest of the Plains of Despair.

buriza-do-kyanon.name: Buriza-Do Kyanon
buriza-do-kyanon.flavor: A weapon of legend, said to pierce the heavens.

eaglehorn.name: Eaglehorn
eaglehorn.flavor: The bow of an ancient hunter, said to never miss its mark.

oculus.name: The Oculus
oculus.flavor: A swirling crystal orb, said to peer beyond the veil between worlds.

griffons-strike.name: Griffon's Strike
griffons-strike.flavor: A maul charged with the fury of a thunderstorm.

stormshield.name: Stormshield
stormshield.flavor: Forged in the heart of a great tempest, this shield turns aside the worst blows.

homunculus.name: Homunculus
homunculus.flavor: A grotesque doll, unsettlingly aware. The dark arts hum within.

pelta-lunata.name: Pelta Lunata
pelta-lunata.flavor: A crescent-moon buckler from the Skovos Isles.

rixots-keen.name: Rixot's Keen
rixots-keen.flavor: A simple short sword, kept impossibly sharp.

biggin-bonnet.name: Biggin's Bonnet
biggin-bonnet.flavor: A jester's cap, lucky to a fault.

face-of-horror.name: The Face of Horror
face-of-horror.flavor: Carven from a twisted gargoyle's likeness.

hotspur.name: Hotspur
hotspur.flavor: A rogue's lucky boots. They ward off flames.

the-gnasher.name: The Gnasher
the-gnasher.flavor: A small axe with a vicious bite.

hand-of-broc.name: The Hand of Broc
hand-of-broc.flavor: Calloused leather that drinks poison harmlessly.

torch-of-iros.name: Torch of Iro
torch-of-iros.flavor: A wand that always burns at the tip.

blood-crescent.name: Blood Crescent
blood-crescent.flavor: A curved blade that drinks deep.

felloak.name: Felloak
felloak.flavor: A burning club of charred oak.

greyform.name: Greyform
greyform.flavor: Plain grey wool that turns aside the cold.

lenymo.name: Lenymo
lenymo.flavor: A spellweaver's sash, threaded with mana.

axe-of-fechmar.name: Axe of Fechmar
axe-of-fechmar.flavor: An icy hand-axe of barbaric make.

coif-of-glory.name: Coif of Glory
coif-of-glory.flavor: A worn coif blessed by a long-dead king.

deathspade.name: Deathspade
deathspade.flavor: A spade-headed hatchet, dull but heavy.

gorefoot.name: Gorefoot
gorefoot.flavor: Bloodstained boots that quicken every stride.

nagelring.name: Nagelring
nagelring.flavor: The merchant's favorite — more gold means more treasures to find.

blinkbat-form.name: Blinkbat's Form
blinkbat-form.flavor: Stitched of bat-leather; quick and silent.

bloodfist.name: Bloodfist
bloodfist.flavor: Soaked in the blood of past battles. Grants raw vitality.

duskdeep.name: Duskdeep
duskdeep.flavor: A helm that drinks the dusk.

shadowfang.name: Shadowfang
shadowfang.flavor: A cold blade carved from frost-iron.

snakecord.name: Snakecord
snakecord.flavor: A live serpent draped at the waist — calmed by old magic.

gleamscythe.name: Gleamscythe
gleamscythe.flavor: A scimitar polished to a moonlight gleam.

witherstring.name: Witherstring
witherstring.flavor: Its string is sinew — strong and sour.

crushflange.name: Crushflange
crushflange.flavor: A flanged mace that pulps any armor.

howltusk.name: Howltusk
howltusk.flavor: Tusks of a slain boar-king set in iron.

umbral-disk.name: Umbral Disk
umbral-disk.flavor: A shadow-forged disk — magic glances aside.

bloodrise.name: Bloodrise
bloodrise.flavor: It seems to grow heavier with every kill.

chance-guards.name: Chance Guards
chance-guards.flavor: Thieves' gloves — fortune just sticks to them.

griswold-edge.name: Griswold's Edge
griswold-edge.flavor: The blacksmith of Tristram's signature blade.

manald-heal.name: Manald Heal
manald-heal.flavor: A ring of regeneration stolen from the temple of Mana.

rasperose.name: Raven Claw
rasperose.flavor: A raven's claw nocks each arrow.

tarnhelm.name: Tarnhelm
tarnhelm.flavor: A humble cap that nevertheless draws fortune to the wearer.

eye-of-etlich.name: The Eye of Etlich
eye-of-etlich.flavor: A pale gem that watches from the wearer's chest.

treads-of-cthon.name: Treads of Cthon
treads-of-cthon.flavor: Leaves no print, no matter the soil.

nokozan-relic.name: Nokozan Relic
nokozan-relic.flavor: A relic from a long-buried fire-temple.

twitchthroe.name: Twitchthroe
twitchthroe.flavor: Restless armor that fidgets in battle.

lance-guard.name: Lance Guard
lance-guard.flavor: A lancer's pavise. Punishing to charge.

rusthandle-scepter.name: Rusty Scepter
rusthandle-scepter.flavor: A holy scepter, neglected but still potent.

the-dragon-chang.name: The Dragon Chang
the-dragon-chang.flavor: A spear-tip wreathed in lazy flame.

doomslinger.name: Doomslinger
doomslinger.flavor: An apprentice's first crossbow — surprisingly potent.

maelstrom.name: Maelstrom
maelstrom.flavor: A spiraling rod that hums with storm.

hawkmail.name: Hawkmail
hawkmail.flavor: Light scales, swift as a hawk.

darkglow.name: Darkglow
darkglow.flavor: It glimmers with a strange, soft light.

nightsmoke.name: Nightsmoke
nightsmoke.flavor: It smolders faintly in the dark.

wall-of-eyeless.name: Wall of the Eyeless
wall-of-eyeless.flavor: A dark mirror that watches back.

stormchaser.name: Stormchaser
stormchaser.flavor: Lightning leaps from its rim to strike attackers.

the-general-tan-do-li-ga.name: The General's Tan Do Li Ga

wormskull.name: Wormskull
wormskull.flavor: Crawling with carrion magic. It grants unholy vitality.

iceblink.name: Iceblink
iceblink.flavor: Frosted plate that numbs an attacker's grip.

knell-striker-scepter.name: Striking Sigil
knell-striker-scepter.flavor: Glyph-engraved scepter — strikes both flesh and faith.

magefist-gauntlet.name: Magefist Gauntlet
magefist-gauntlet.flavor: A larger Vizjerei apprentice glove — fire-laced.

stormguild.name: Stormguild
stormguild.flavor: A guildsmen's mark, charged with storm.

jade-tan-do.name: The Jade Tan Do
jade-tan-do.flavor: A jade-edged dirk for clean, quiet kills.

heavenly-garb.name: Heavenly Garb
heavenly-garb.flavor: A robe spun from sunset cloth.

gravenspine.name: Gravenspine
gravenspine.flavor: Carved from the spine of a long-dead lich.

hellplague.name: Hellplague
hellplague.flavor: A blade that fester wounds with every cut.

razor-stitch.name: Razortail Pike
razor-stitch.flavor: A barbed pike — leaves a wound that never closes.

spectral-shard.name: Spectral Shard
spectral-shard.flavor: A glassy ghost-blade. It cuts through wards.

stormstrike.name: Stormstrike
stormstrike.flavor: Each loosed arrow crackles with thunder.

mahim-oak-curio.name: The Mahim-Oak Curio
mahim-oak-curio.flavor: A curio whittled from a holy oak.

undead-crown.name: Undead Crown
undead-crown.flavor: Worn by the puppet-king of a forgotten crypt.

venom-ward.name: Venom Ward
venom-ward.flavor: Steeped in antitoxins by a desert druid.

wizendraw.name: Wizendraw
wizendraw.flavor: An ancient bow — its string never warps.

black-cleft.name: Black Cleft
black-cleft.flavor: A jagged blade of frostbitten iron.

ichorsting.name: Ichorsting
ichorsting.flavor: A barbed axe — wounds fester for days.

ring-of-the-leech.name: Ring of the Leech
ring-of-the-leech.flavor: A ring fashioned from a vampire's tooth.

boneflesh.name: Boneflesh
boneflesh.flavor: A grim coat of bone-plates lashed with sinew.

peasant-crown.name: Peasant Crown
peasant-crown.flavor: A simple circlet that brought a serf to glory.

silks-of-the-victor.name: Silks of the Victor
silks-of-the-victor.flavor: Worn by champions of the arena.

the-spirit-shroud.name: The Spirit Shroud
the-spirit-shroud.flavor: A whisper-thin robe haunted by past wearers.

visceratuant.name: Visceratuant
visceratuant.flavor: A spell-shield carved with binding glyphs.

frostburn.name: Frostburn
frostburn.flavor: Frozen gauntlets that amplify both mana and chill.

tearhaunch.name: Tearhaunch
tearhaunch.flavor: A pilgrim's worn boots — quick and tireless.

venom-grip.name: Venom Grip
venom-grip.flavor: Snakeskin gauntlets that drip with venom.

whistan-guard.name: Whitstan's Guard
whistan-guard.flavor: A paladin's ward. It deflects blows with holy resilience.

ume-lament.name: Ume's Lament
ume-lament.flavor: A widow's wand — it weeps for the dead.

moser-circle.name: Moser's Blessed Circle
moser-circle.flavor: Engraved with protective runes. It wards off all harm.

ribcracker.name: Ribcracker
ribcracker.flavor: A staff that finds the gaps between ribs.

riphook.name: Riphook
riphook.flavor: Hooked-tip arrows that tear on withdrawal.

skin-of-flayed-one.name: Skin of the Flayed One
skin-of-flayed-one.flavor: It still twitches when blood is shed near it.

the-impaler.name: The Impaler
the-impaler.flavor: A spiked pike that runs foes through.

dark-clan-crusher.name: Dark Clan Crusher
dark-clan-crusher.flavor: A clan-mace blackened with old soot.

kinemil-awl.name: Kinemil's Awl
kinemil-awl.flavor: A red-hot point that never cools.

razortail.name: Razortail
razortail.flavor: Crafted from a demon's spine. Arrows and bolts pierce through foes.

iron-pelt.name: Iron Pelt
iron-pelt.flavor: A tribe-chief's plate, banded in cold iron.

kelpie-snare.name: Kelpie Snare
kelpie-snare.flavor: A jagged hook from the cold deeps.

razor-tine.name: Razor's Tine
razor-tine.flavor: A vicious bearded axe with a hair-thin edge.

the-nokozan.name: The Nokozan
the-nokozan.flavor: A relic from a buried fire-temple.

blacktongue.name: Blacktongue
blacktongue.flavor: A tongue-shaped blade, drips with venom.

blade-of-ali-baba.name: Blade of Ali Baba
blade-of-ali-baba.flavor: A thief's blade — even the dust turns to coin.

blastbark.name: Blastbark
blastbark.flavor: A bark-yew bow that shatters wards.

skystrike.name: Skystrike
skystrike.flavor: An archer-king's bow — calls down lightning.

stealskull.name: Stealskull
stealskull.flavor: A thief's prized helm — fortune flocks to its wearer.

crow-caw.name: Crow Caw
crow-caw.flavor: Black feathers fan out at every sudden move.

gloom-trap.name: Gloom's Trap
gloom-trap.flavor: A scholar's sash — knowledge weighs heavy.

goldskin.name: Goldskin
goldskin.flavor: Gilded with the sweat of a covetous king.

ripsaw.name: Ripsaw
ripsaw.flavor: Toothed iron — it tears flesh into ribbons.

the-meatscraper.name: The Meat Scraper
the-meatscraper.flavor: A butcher's blade — meant for unfair fights.

hone-sundan.name: Hone Sundan
hone-sundan.flavor: A bone-shaped polearm, brittle-looking but deadly.

blackleach-staff.name: Blackleach (Staff)
blackleach-staff.flavor: A leech-shaped polearm draining the unwary.

blackleach-blade.name: Blackleach Blade
blackleach-blade.flavor: A leech-shaped blade that drinks blood.

darksight-helm.name: Darksight Helm
darksight-helm.flavor: Casts an eerie veil over the wearer's face.

gravepalm.name: Gravepalm
gravepalm.flavor: Necromantic gloves — your touch withers the living.

the-vile-husk.name: The Vile Husk
the-vile-husk.flavor: A hollow, husk-light blade humming with poison.

butcher-pupil.name: Butcher's Pupil
butcher-pupil.flavor: A meat-cleaver as taught by the Butcher of Tristram.

the-meat-scraper-2.name: The Meat Scraper (Pole)
the-meat-scraper-2.flavor: A bladed pole that scrapes corpses clean.

the-patriarch.name: The Patriarch
the-patriarch.flavor: A clan-elder's sword, wisdom in steel.

spirit-ward.name: Spirit Ward
spirit-ward.flavor: Bound with ancestral spirits. It deflects magical and physical harm.

the-atlantean.name: The Atlantean Sword
the-atlantean.flavor: A sword of the drowned legions.

blackhorn-face.name: Blackhorn's Face
blackhorn-face.flavor: Twin black horns rise from the brow.

duriel-shell.name: Duriel's Shell
duriel-shell.flavor: Armor forged from the carapace of the Lord of Pain himself.

lidless-wall.name: Lidless Wall
lidless-wall.flavor: A sorceress's shield that never blinks. Grants arcane clarity.

rusthandle.name: Rusthandle
rusthandle.flavor: Looks ruined, hits like a falling tower.

spire-of-honor.name: Spire of Honor
spire-of-honor.flavor: A polearm tipped with a paladin's signet.

vampiregaze.name: Vampire Gaze
vampiregaze.flavor: It feeds on suffering and offers stolen life in return.

arreat-face.name: Arreat's Face
arreat-face.flavor: The war-mask of Mount Arreat's guardians. Strength and savagery incarnate.

bartuc-cut-throat.name: Bartuc's Cut-Throat
bartuc-cut-throat.flavor: A demon-lord's twin claws — quick as thought.

herald-of-zakarum.name: Herald of Zakarum
herald-of-zakarum.flavor: A paladin's auric shield — radiant gold.

jalal-mane.name: Jalal's Mane
jalal-mane.flavor: Lion-mane druid pelt, fierce and noble.

steelclash.name: Steelclash
steelclash.flavor: Rings like a bell when struck.

the-oculus-orb.name: The Oculus (Orb)
the-oculus-orb.flavor: An orb of swirling crystal — sight beyond sight.

titan-revenge.name: Titan's Revenge
titan-revenge.flavor: A javelin that returns to its bearer's hand.

earth-shaker.name: Earth Shaker
earth-shaker.flavor: Strikes the earth with a thunderclap.

the-collector.name: The Collector
the-collector.flavor: Worn by a noble collector of relics.

gerke-sanctuary.name: Gerke's Sanctuary
gerke-sanctuary.flavor: A massive ward blessed by a fallen paladin.

valkyrie-wing.name: Valkyrie Wing
valkyrie-wing.flavor: A winged helm worn by a fallen battle-maid.

dwarf-star.name: Dwarf Star
dwarf-star.flavor: A tiny ruby cut by dwarven hands.

goldstrike-arch.name: Goldstrike Arch
goldstrike-arch.flavor: A merchant-king's bow. It turns kills into coins.

blackhand-key.name: Blackhand Key
blackhand-key.flavor: A skull-key set into a necromancer's totem.

ghoulhide.name: Ghoulhide
ghoulhide.flavor: Stripped from a ghoul-king. They still hunger.

immortal-king-helm-uniq.name: Immortal King Cap (replica)
immortal-king-helm-uniq.flavor: A reproduction of an Immortal King's circlet.

soul-drainer.name: Soul Drainer
soul-drainer.flavor: Each strike saps the life and mana of foes, feeding the wearer.

crown-of-thieves.name: Crown of Thieves
crown-of-thieves.flavor: A crown stolen from a king who stole it first.

demon-machine.name: Demon Machine
demon-machine.flavor: A crossbow possessed by a demon's spirit. It fires with unholy speed.

frostburn-gauntlet.name: Frostburn Gauntlet
frostburn-gauntlet.flavor: A frost-burned gauntlet — chills the wearer's foes.

infernostride.name: Infernostride
infernostride.flavor: Each step leaves a cinder smoldering.

spirit-forge.name: Spirit Forge
spirit-forge.flavor: Quenched in the tears of a battle-spirit.

waterwalk.name: Waterwalk
waterwalk.flavor: They glide over water as easily as land.

crainte-vomir.name: Crainte Vomir
crainte-vomir.flavor: A baroque blade dripping with menace.

hellplague-greater.name: Hellplague (Greater)
hellplague-greater.flavor: A blade that festers wounds with fire and rot.

atlantean.name: The Atlantean
atlantean.flavor: Salt-eaten plate from a sunken empire.

cat-eye.name: The Cat's Eye
cat-eye.flavor: A feline gem — sharp eyes, swift paws.

nosferatu-coil.name: Nosferatu's Coil
nosferatu-coil.flavor: A vampire-lord's belt — drains the unwary.

black-hades.name: Black Hades
black-hades.flavor: Forged in the cold black heart of a volcano.

hexfire.name: Hexfire
hexfire.flavor: A cursed scimitar — fire surges through every cut.

stoneraven.name: Stoneraven
stoneraven.flavor: A raven-stone polearm hewn by giants.

the-battlebranch.name: The Battlebranch
the-battlebranch.flavor: A young oak hewn into a war-pole.

veil-of-steel.name: Veil of Steel
veil-of-steel.flavor: An indomitable steel mask that turns aside all elements.

frostwind.name: Frostwind
frostwind.flavor: An icy blade that freezes foes mid-swing.

bing-sz-wang.name: Bing Sz Wang
bing-sz-wang.flavor: Frosted katana — its edge never melts.

buriza-do-kyanon-cb.name: Buriza-Do Kyanon (Crossbow)
buriza-do-kyanon-cb.flavor: An ice-bolt crossbow of devastating reach.

corpsemourn.name: Corpsemourn
corpsemourn.flavor: It weeps for the dead it has carried into battle.

endlesshail.name: Endlesshail
endlesshail.flavor: Looses arrows in a frozen rain.

gore-burnt-skull.name: Goreburnt Skull
gore-burnt-skull.flavor: A barbarian's trophy-helm, scarred by hellfire.

snowclash.name: Snowclash
snowclash.flavor: A glacier-forged belt that radiates a chill.

string-of-ears-greater.name: String of Ears (Greater)
string-of-ears-greater.flavor: A grand grim trophy — hung with mightier ears.

tiamat-rebuke.name: Tiamat's Rebuke
tiamat-rebuke.flavor: A dragon's hide stretched on a great frame.

blackhorn-face-2.name: Blackhorn's Face (Greater)
blackhorn-face-2.flavor: A larger version of the dread mask.

homunculus-orb.name: Homunculus (Orb)
homunculus-orb.flavor: A fetus-shaped orb that whispers spells.

the-chieftain.name: The Chieftain
the-chieftain.flavor: A great axe of clan-leadership, well-respected.

steel-driver.name: Steeldriver
steel-driver.flavor: A maul-pole that hammers steel into the earth.

bul-kathos-wedding-band.name: Bul-Kathos' Wedding Band
bul-kathos-wedding-band.flavor: Worn by the ancient warlord himself. It whispers of strength and vitality.

shadow-killer.name: Shadow Killer
shadow-killer.flavor: An assassin's signature blade — silent and certain.

spike-thorn.name: Spike Thorn
spike-thorn.flavor: Bristling iron thorns punish the bold.

stormlash.name: Stormlash
stormlash.flavor: A scourge that channels the fury of storms.

the-vile-husk-armor.name: Husk of Bones
the-vile-husk-armor.flavor: Bone-plates lashed with sinew — eerily light.

suicide-branch.name: Suicide Branch
suicide-branch.flavor: A withered branch that pleads to be broken.

the-vile-husk-2.name: The Vile Husk II
the-vile-husk-2.flavor: A second blade of the same accursed lineage.

blackoak-shield.name: Blackoak Shield
blackoak-shield.flavor: A druidic shield carved from the heartwood of a cursed oak.

heaven-light.name: Heaven's Light
heaven-light.flavor: A holy scepter blessed by angels. Paladins wield it with devotion.

hellmouth.name: Hellmouth
hellmouth.flavor: Tongues of flame lick from every fingertip.

vampire-gaze-greater.name: Vampire Gaze (Greater)
vampire-gaze-greater.flavor: A reforged version of the cursed gaze.

firelizard-talon.name: Firelizard's Talons
firelizard-talon.flavor: Lava-lizard claws that scorch the air.

steel-shade.name: Steel Shade
steel-shade.flavor: A shadowy helm forged of moon-touched steel.

steelshade.name: Steelshade
steelshade.flavor: A helm of tempered shadow-steel. It deflects both blows and magic.

the-redeemer.name: The Redeemer
the-redeemer.flavor: A holy scepter that redeems the wicked through fire.

boneshade.name: Boneshade
boneshade.flavor: A bone-white wand cut from a saint's femur.

demon-limb.name: Demon Limb
demon-limb.flavor: Ripped from a fallen pit lord.

cure-all.name: Cure-All
cure-all.flavor: A potion-maker's helm — heals all manner of ills.

sandstorm-trek.name: Sandstorm Trek
sandstorm-trek.flavor: Worn across countless deserts. Grants stamina and resilience.

leviathan.name: Leviathan
leviathan.flavor: An oceanic titan's hide. It grants near-immunity to the elements.

steel-carapace.name: Steel Carapace
steel-carapace.flavor: An insectoid plate of overlapping steel.

steel-pillar.name: Steel Pillar
steel-pillar.flavor: It's less a weapon and more a column.

rising-sun.name: The Rising Sun
rising-sun.flavor: A sun-warm pendant. Demons burn at its glow.

widowmaker.name: Widowmaker
widowmaker.flavor: A widow-bow — leaves no husband walking.

astreon-iron-ward.name: Astreon's Iron Ward
astreon-iron-ward.flavor: A legendary warlord's mace. It crushes both armor and bone.

death-web.name: Death's Web
death-web.flavor: A necromancer's ultimate wand. Poison courses through every hex.

hellslayer.name: Hellslayer
hellslayer.flavor: An axe forged in the depths of the Burning Hells.

jade-talon.name: Jade Talon
jade-talon.flavor: A jade-edged claw — every cut is venom.

lightsabre.name: Lightsabre
lightsabre.flavor: A sword of pure lightning. It crackles with every swing.

cerebus-bite.name: Cerebus' Bite
cerebus-bite.flavor: A three-headed wolf-pelt for a druid.

darkforce-spawn.name: Darkforce Spawn
darkforce-spawn.flavor: A demon-skull totem, alive with whispers.

darkforce-spawn-shield.name: Darkforce Spawn (Shield)
darkforce-spawn-shield.flavor: A bone-fetish shield — a necromancer's pride.

demonhorn-edge.name: Demonhorn's Edge
demonhorn-edge.flavor: Carved from the horn of a slain pit lord.

dragonscale.name: Dragonscale
dragonscale.flavor: A scaled shield from a slain wyrm.

nightwing-veil.name: Nightwing's Veil
nightwing-veil.flavor: Shadow-silk woven into a sorcerer's diadem.

spellsteel.name: Spellsteel
spellsteel.flavor: Sigils glow on its haft when foes near.

lacerator.name: Lacerator
lacerator.flavor: A jagged axe — every wound pours blood.

nords-tenderizer.name: Nord's Tenderizer
nords-tenderizer.flavor: A flailing meat-mallet from the icebound north.

plague-bearer.name: Plague Bearer
plague-bearer.flavor: A sword that brings a withering rot.

blackhand-key-2.name: Blackhand Key (Greater)
blackhand-key-2.flavor: A larger key-wand of necromantic make.

earthshifter.name: Earthshifter
earthshifter.flavor: A maul that cracks stone underfoot.

rune-master.name: Rune Master
rune-master.flavor: A rune-etched two-hander — cuts both flesh and spell.

thunderstroke.name: Thunderstroke
thunderstroke.flavor: A storm-spear from the celestial heights.

eschuta-temper.name: Eschuta's Temper
eschuta-temper.flavor: A volatile wand — temper as short as its fuse.

stormrider.name: Stormrider
stormrider.flavor: Wielded by a storm-knight of the Skovos.

stormspire.name: Stormspire
stormspire.flavor: A towering polearm that calls lightning from the sky.

the-grim-reaper.name: The Grim Reaper
the-grim-reaper.flavor: A scythe that ushers souls to oblivion.

death-fathom.name: Death's Fathom
death-fathom.flavor: A scrying-orb wand — sees deep into icy oblivion.

the-stone-crusher.name: The Stone Crusher
the-stone-crusher.flavor: A maul that splits boulders open.

ondal-wisdom.name: Ondal's Wisdom
ondal-wisdom.flavor: An archmage's senile wand — still a fount of power.

ravenlore.name: Ravenlore
ravenlore.flavor: A raven-spirit headdress, learned and dark.

templar-might.name: Templar's Might
templar-might.flavor: The breastplate of a holy crusader.

boneslayer-blade.name: Boneslayer Blade
boneslayer-blade.flavor: Carves through bone like soft wood.

head-hunter-glory.name: Head Hunter's Glory
head-hunter-glory.flavor: Trophy-skulls of slain champions adorn its rim.

spirit-keeper.name: Spirit Keeper
spirit-keeper.flavor: Holds the spirits of fallen druid elders.

reaper-toll.name: The Reaper's Toll
reaper-toll.flavor: A polearm that saps life from the living and delivers it to the wielder.

hellrack.name: Hellrack
hellrack.flavor: A demonic crossbow that fires hellfire.

wisp-projector.name: Wisp Projector
wisp-projector.flavor: Dancing wisps swirl around the wearer.

alma-negra.name: Alma Negra
alma-negra.flavor: A dark-soul shield bound to its bearer.

kira-guardian.name: Kira's Guardian
kira-guardian.flavor: A guardian-spirit helm — blessed for travelers.

arreats-face-uniq.name: Arreat's Face (Greater)
arreats-face-uniq.flavor: A war-mask of greater might. (Closest base mapping.)

knell-striker-2.name: Knell Striker (Greater)
knell-striker-2.flavor: Tolls the death-knell with every swing.

ondal-almighty.name: Ondal's Almighty
ondal-almighty.flavor: An archmage's full-plate, etched with old runes.

boneflame-shield.name: Boneflame Shield
boneflame-shield.flavor: Skulls along its rim spit cold fire.

hand-of-blessed-light.name: Hand of Blessed Light
hand-of-blessed-light.flavor: A holy mace radiating sun-warm light.

schaefer-hammer.name: Schaefer's Hammer
schaefer-hammer.flavor: A thunderous warhammer. It calls down lightning on the wicked.

wolfhowl.name: Wolfhowl
wolfhowl.flavor: A druid pelt-helm that sings of the moon.

the-minotaur.name: The Minotaur
the-minotaur.flavor: An axe of the labyrinth's lord.

baranar-star.name: Baranar's Star
baranar-star.flavor: A devil's own mace. It crushes the righteous and the damned alike.

metalgrid.name: Metalgrid
metalgrid.flavor: An iron lattice — pure structure and protection.

demonhorn-edge-2.name: Demonhorn's Edge (Greater)
demonhorn-edge-2.flavor: A larger demon-horn helm of greater make.

halaberd-reign-2.name: Halaberd's Reign (Greater)
halaberd-reign-2.flavor: A barbarian crown of unmatched lineage.

messerschmidt-reaver.name: Messerschmidt's Reaver
messerschmidt-reaver.flavor: A masterwork two-hander of staggering reach.

tomb-reaver.name: Tomb Reaver
tomb-reaver.flavor: Unearthed from a king's tomb. It grants power beyond measure.

azurewrath.name: Azurewrath
azurewrath.flavor: The blade of a celestial warrior. Demons flee before its light.

ethereal-edge.name: Ethereal Edge
ethereal-edge.flavor: A blade glimpsed half in this world, half in another.

the-gladiator-bane.name: The Gladiator's Bane
the-gladiator-bane.flavor: Worn into countless arenas. None of its foes survived.

the-cranium-basher.name: The Cranium Basher
the-cranium-basher.flavor: It does what its name suggests.

the-cranium-basher-greater.name: The Cranium Basher (Greater)
the-cranium-basher-greater.flavor: A maul of unmatched bone-shattering force.
